title: CC narrative review S01 panel a3

payload.notes: Scored the rendered image at examples/comic_m3_audit/panels/S01_panel_a03.png against the S01 spec in examples/comic_m3_audit/comic.json. Intended beat: establish deadline pressure (24h), the exhausted researcher before the hand-off, the DARK failed run she's staring at, and a preview of the ARIS duo's world. BEAT FIDELITY 5/5 — the opening tableau lands: the exhausted researcher in the warm study, the dark terminal showing the failed structured-decoding run, the DDL T-24:00:00 countdown made literal, and the topic seed left hanging as the unsolved thread. COMPOSITION (STORY) 4/5 — reading order works (researcher → dark terminal log → DDL chip → topic seed) but the lower log/caption region stays slightly busy and competes with the figure for first read; docked one point for that crowding. Visual identity-lock / artifact severity / baked-text legibility / content-corruption are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
